TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Rahaw（Takan）, title = Rahaw（Takan）, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rahaw（Takan）} }

S.FORM: Rahaw(Takan) Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Rahaw(Takan) a niyaro', 60 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 217 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 202 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, Truku1%, roma2%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: raħaw(takan) itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u raħaw(takan) a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Rahaw(Takan) Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Rahaw(Takan) a niyaro', 60 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 217 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 202 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, Truku1%, roma2%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: raħaw(takan) itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u raħaw(takan) a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
